title: thlaspi ruderale
intro: Thlaspi ruderale, also known as field penny-cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi ruderale include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Thlaspi ruderale can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested as a tea or capsule.
